flows.name: Lead to Opportunity Sales Process
flows.triggerType: Active on lead; spans lead and opportunity

flows.name: Contoso Lead Scoring & Routing
flows.triggerType: When a lead is created or updated (Dataverse trigger)

flows.name: Deal Desk Approval Routing
flows.triggerType: When a Deal Desk Review is created

flows.name: Auto-Create Deal Desk Review on Strategic Deal
flows.triggerType: Update of opportunity where con_strategicdeal = true and requested discount exceeds threshold

flows.name: Require Est. Close Date & Value on Propose
flows.triggerType: Form load / field change when salesstagecode = Propose

flows.name: Invoice Paid Sync from F&O
flows.triggerType: On create of Customer Payment (F&O) related to an invoice

flows.name: Phase to First Response and Resolution
Auto-Route New Cases to Tier Queue
Sync CSAT Survey Responses to Service Feedback
flows.triggerType: When a survey response is submitted (Customer Voice)

flows.name: Auto-Create Safety Inspection for Hazardous Work Orders
flows.triggerType: On create/update of msdyn_workorder when con_hazardsiteflag = true

flows.name: SLA Breach Risk Escalation
flows.triggerType: When con_slabreachrisk changes to High or Breached

flows.name: Truck Stock Replenishment Request
flows.triggerType: When msdyn_availablequantity falls below reorder point

flows.name: Require Serial Number on Serviceable Assets
flows.triggerType: On form load / save of msdyn_customerasset

flows.name: Expense Receipt Required Rule
flows.triggerType: Form load / field change on msdyn_expense

flows.name: Sales-Ready Lead Handoff
flows.triggerType: Update of leadscore crossing sales-ready threshold

flows.name: Campaign Brief Approval Routing
flows.triggerType: When con_approvalstatus set to In Review

flows.name: Consent Change Suppression Sync
flows.triggerType: On update of msdynmkt_consentstatus to Opt-out

flows.name: Require Legal Footer Before Email Go-Live
flows.triggerType: Form load / field change on Marketing Email

flows.name: Campaign Brief to Launch BPF
flows.triggerType: Manual stage advance from Brief record

flows.name: Sync Churn Prediction to Loyalty Tier
flows.triggerType: On Create of Prediction Score (churn model)

flows.name: Consent Verified Guard for Segment Activation
Data Source Health Alert to Teams
DSR Delete Propagation
flows.triggerType: On Create where con_consenttype = DSR - Delete

flows.name: AP Invoice Approval BPF
flows.triggerType: Record created from dual-write vendor invoice

flows.name: Capex Budget Check Flow
flows.triggerType: On con_capexrequest status change to Submitted

flows.name: Vendor Invoice Post Realtime Workflow
flows.triggerType: On update of statuscode to Approved

flows.name: Auto-Set ABC Classification
flows.triggerType: On load / on change of estimated value

flows.name: Generate PO in F&O on Approval
Curbside Handoff Notification
flows.triggerType: When con_handoffstatus changes to Customer Arrived

flows.name: Price Match Approval
flows.triggerType: When a price match request is created

flows.name: Channel Data Publish Trigger
flows.triggerType: When a pricing rule is created or updated

flows.name: Leave Balance Notification Flow
flows.triggerType: When a leave request is approved (Dataverse)

flows.name: Position Cost Center Validation
flows.triggerType: On form load / save of Position

flows.name: Set VIP Flag on High-Value Customer
flows.triggerType: On load / on change of customer

flows.name: Post-Conversation CSAT Survey Dispatch
flows.triggerType: When a conversation is closed (Dataverse trigger)

flows.name: Environment Provisioning Approval
flows.triggerType: When a row is created (con_environmentinventory, con_lifecyclestate = Requested)

flows.name: Consent Capture Business Rule
flows.triggerType: On form load / change of con_consentstatus
